overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} \left. \begin{array}{c c} a _ {1} = 1 & 1 = 2 ^ {0} \\ \left. \begin{array}{c} a _ {2} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 2 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {1} = 2 \cdot 1 = 2 \\ a _ {3} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 3 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {1} = 2 \cdot 1 = 2 \end{array} \right\} & 2 = 2 ^ {1} \\ \left. \begin{array}{c} a _ {4} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 4 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {2} = 2 \cdot 2 = 4 \\ a _ {5} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 5 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {2} = 2 \cdot 2 = 4 \\ a _ {6} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 6 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {3} = 2 \cdot 2 = 4 \\ a _ {7} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 7 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {3} = 2 \cdot 2 = 4 \end{array} \right\} & 4 = 2 ^ {2} \\ \left. \begin{array}{c c} a _ {8} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 8 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {4} = 2 \cdot 4 = 8 \\ a _ {9} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 9 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {4} = 2 \cdot 4 = 8 \\ \vdots & \vdots \\ a _ {1 5} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 1 5 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {7} = 2 \cdot 4 = 8 \end{array} \right\} & 8 = 2 ^ {3} \\ \left. \begin{array}{c c} a _ {1 6} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 1 6 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {8} = 2 \cdot 8 = 1 6 \\ \vdots & \vdots \end{array} \right\} & 1 6 = 2 ^ {4} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} \left. \begin{array}{c c} a _ {1} = 1 & 1 = 2 ^ {0} \\ \left. \begin{array}{c} a _ {2} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 2 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {1} = 2 \cdot 1 = 2 \\ a _ {3} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 3 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {1} = 2 \cdot 1 = 2 \end{array} \right\} & 2 = 2 ^ {1} \\ \left. \begin{array}{c} a _ {4} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 4 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {2} = 2 \cdot 2 = 4 \\ a _ {5} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 5 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {2} = 2 \cdot 2 = 4 \\ a _ {6} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 6 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {3} = 2 \cdot 2 = 4 \\ a _ {7} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 7 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {3} = 2 \cdot 2 = 4 \end{array} \right\} & 4 = 2 ^ {2} \\ \left. \begin{array}{c c} a _ {8} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 8 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {4} = 2 \cdot 4 = 8 \\ a _ {9} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 9 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {4} = 2 \cdot 4 = 8 \\ \vdots & \vdots \\ a _ {1 5} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 1 5 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {7} = 2 \cdot 4 = 8 \end{array} \right\} & 8 = 2 ^ {3} \\ \left. \begin{array}{c c} a _ {1 6} = 2 a _ {\lfloor 1 6 / 2 \rfloor} = 2 a _ {8} = 2 \cdot 8 = 1 6 \\ \vdots & \vdots \end{array} \right\} & 1 6 = 2 ^ {4} \end{array} \right. \end{array}
